## Summary

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Game-data update
- [ ] Formula or engine change
- [ ] Profile migration
- [ ] Documentation or tests

## Confidence and sources

Describe whether calculations are verified, reference-aligned, estimated, or strategic, and identify source versions.

## Testing

- [ ] `python tools/public_release_audit.py`
- [ ] `python tools/smoke_test.py`
- [ ] `python tools/v2_preview_validation.py`
- [ ] `pytest -q`

## Privacy and assets

- [ ] No real profiles, player IDs, workbooks, diagnostics, local paths, secrets, or unlicensed game artwork are included.
